title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI

title_zh: Anthropic的安全警告可能刚刚适得其反—政府已经取消了其最强大的人工智能
summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
summary_en: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
summary_zh: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”
ai_summary: Anthropic并没有掩饰它的挫败感。该公司在一篇博客文章中写道： “我们不同意，发现狭隘的潜在越狱应该是召回部署给数亿人的商业模式的原因。”

summary_en: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.
summary_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，一个名为“局外人企业”的组织使用人工智能来诈骗数十万受害者，在两周内发送了250万条短信。
ai_summary: 这家科技巨头表示，一个名为“局外人企业”的组织使用人工智能来诈骗数十万受害者，在两周内发送了250万条短信。
